param.name: enableMinCargoUtil
param.comment: Per-ship cache selection when order useMinCargoThreshold is on; skip rows below ship capacity x minCargoUtilPercent.

param.name: maxRouteTrades
param.comment: When gt 1, min-cargo util is enforced at multitrade route assembly, not per cache row.

set_value.name: $purgeReResolvable
set_value.exact: (@$purgeEntry.$Ware != null or @$purgeEntry.$DeliveryStationName != null) and (@$purgeEntry.$DeliveryStationId != null or @$purgeEntry.$DeliveryStationName != null) and ((@$purgeEntry.$SellSector != null and @$purgeEntry.$SellSector.exists) or @$purgeEntry.$SellSectorId != null or @$purgeEntry.$DeliveryStationId != null)

do_if.value: not $purgeRemove and not $purgeReResolvable and @$purgeEntry.$SellOffer != null and not @$purgeEntry.$SellOffer.exists
not $purgeRemove and not $purgeReResolvable and @$purgeEntry.$SellStation != null and not @$purgeEntry.$SellStation.exists

debug_text.text: '[GT-CacheSearch] ' + $ship.idcode + ': (' + $poolLabel + ') Read-time purge removed ' + $purgedStaleCount + ' stale entries from ' + $cacheHomeKey.knownname + ' (remaining: ' + $homeCacheCount + ')'

set_value.name: $wareBasketCount
set_value.exact: if $wareBasket? and typeof $wareBasket == datatype.list then $wareBasket.count else 0

do_if.value: (not $entrySellStation? or not @$entrySellStation.exists) and $entry.$DeliveryStationId? and $entry.$Ware? and $homeSector? and @$homeSector.exists

not $mk42DelIdTarget? and $mk42DelIdScanBsCand? and @$mk42DelIdScanBsCand.exists and $mk42DelIdScanBsCand.base? and @$mk42DelIdScanBsCand.base.exists and @$mk42DelIdScanBsCand.base.idcode == $entry.$DeliveryStationId
(not $entrySellStation? or not @$entrySellStation.exists) and $reSellSector? and @$reSellSector.exists and $entry.$Ware? and $entry.$DeliveryStationId?

set_value.name: $serveHomeSector
set_value.exact: if $serveHomeAnchor? and $serveHomeAnchor.isclass.sector then $serveHomeAnchor else (if $serveHomeAnchor? and $serveHomeAnchor.sector? then @$serveHomeAnchor.sector else $homeSector)

do_if.value: not $mk42Priorities? and $cacheDropoffTolerance gt 0 and not $entry.$IsSellOnly? and $entry.$UnitProfit? and $entry.$UnitProfit gt 0 and $entry.$BuyOffer? and $entry.$SellOffer?

($entryBuyStation? and @$entryBuyStation.isclass.ship and @$entryBuyStation.primarypurpose == purpose.auxiliary) or ($entrySellStation? and @$entrySellStation.isclass.ship and @$entrySellStation.primarypurpose == purpose.auxiliary)
$enableMinCargoUtil and not $isIsolatedMode and not $entry.$IsSellOnly? and (not $maxRouteTrades? or $maxRouteTrades le 1)

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + $ship.idcode + ': Cache search REJECT breakdown [ANCHORv4] (pool=' + $homeCacheCount + ', rejected=' + $rejTotal + ', home=' + (if $homeSector? then $homeSector.name else '?') + '):' + (if $rejBreakdownStr != '' then $rejBreakdownStr else ' (none - empty/stale pool)')
